report.title: Assessment Report
report.notAvailable: Your report is not yet available.

candidateSkills.title: My Skills
candidateSkills.rolePlaceholder: Hello {{name}} - your skill map will appear here once a role profile has been assigned to you.
candidateSkills.noProfileBody: An administrator hasn't linked you to a role profile yet, so there are no target proficiencies to compare your scores against. Check back after the assessment has been set up, or contact your VIFM facilitator if you think this is a mistake.
candidateSkills.migrationMissing: Admin: run npx supabase db push to apply migration 00016 before binding candidates to role profiles.
candidateSkills.noCompetencies: This role profile has no competencies linked yet. Ask your administrator to populate the profile.

stats.subtitle: Based on consensus ratings from your assessment
stats.progressBlurb: How much of your role profile has been assessed.
stats.byDomainBlurb: How your role profile is distributed across the VIFM framework.
stats.avgByDomainBlurb: Your average BARS score (1–5) per VIFM domain. 0 = not yet assessed.

quiz.endSessionConfirm: End this session? Your unanswered questions will count as zero. You can retake at any time.
quiz.autoSavedHint: Your answer for this question is saved automatically.

results.headerWellDoneBody: Great work on this competency. Try a harder one next.
results.headerKeepLearningBody: You can retake the quiz at any time to improve your score.
results.headerSessionEndedBody: You can retake the quiz at any time to improve your score.

notifications.candidateEmpty: You're all caught up - no notifications yet.

candidateWelcome.intro: Welcome to the VIFM Assessment Center. You have been selected to participate in an assessment for the role outlined below. This process is designed to evaluate your competencies through a series of structured exercises.

form.title: Your Profile Details
form.subtitle: Please provide the following information for tracking and identification purposes.

candidateConsent.title: Consent & Data Protection
candidateConsent.noticeIntro: In accordance with the UAE Federal Decree-Law No. 45 of 2021 on Personal Data Protection, the Saudi Arabia Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL), and the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), we are required to obtain your explicit consent before collecting and processing your personal data.
candidateConsent.noticeCollect: Virginia Institute of Finance and Management (VIFM) will collect and process the following data during the assessment:
candidateConsent.collectItem4: Audio/video recordings (if applicable for virtual sessions)
candidateConsent.noticeRetention: Your data will be retained for a maximum of 2 years from the assessment date unless otherwise agreed contractually. You have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your data at any time.
candidateConsent.readConfirm: I confirm I have read and understood the notice above.
candidateConsent.dataConsent: I consent to the collection and processing of my personal data as described above for the purpose of the assessment center evaluation. I understand my rights under applicable data protection laws.
candidateConsent.assessmentConsent: I voluntarily agree to participate in the assessment center and understand that the results will be shared with the sponsoring organization for the purpose of talent evaluation and development.
candidateConsent.contactConsent: I agree that VIFM can contact me, including by email, in order to participate in future test trials, surveys, and to provide further information relating to the assessment.
candidateConsent.clientForms: I agree to complete any additional forms provided by the sponsoring organization before the start of the assessment (e.g., application forms, surveys).

candidateAssessments.title: Your Assessments
candidateAssessments.noExercises: No exercises scheduled yet. Check back closer to your assessment date.
candidateAssessments.important1: Each exercise is designed to assess specific competencies relevant to the target role. Please arrive prepared and on time for each session.
candidateAssessments.important2: During the exercises, trained assessors will observe your behavior and record observations. There are no right or wrong answers - the assessment evaluates how you approach situations naturally.
candidateAssessments.important3: Your results will be compiled into a confidential assessment report, which will be shared with you once finalized.

candidateReport.title: Your Assessment Report
candidateReport.notAvailableTitle: Your report is not yet available.
candidateReport.notAvailableBody: Assessment results are currently being processed. You will be notified when your report is ready for viewing.
candidateReport.fullReportBody: Detailed behavioral evidence, scores, and competency findings (~6 pages).
candidateReport.learningPlanBody: Your 30 / 60 / 90 day development roadmap with targeted actions per competency.

candidatePathway.title: My learning pathway
candidatePathway.subtitle: AI turns your assessed gaps into a sequenced, course-by-course development plan.

academy.recommendedBlurb: Chosen from your assessment to close your highest-priority skill gaps.
academy.notEnrolledTitle: You are not enrolled in any courses yet
academy.notEnrolledBody: Explore the VIFM catalogue to find a programme that fits your goals.

course.completeEveryLesson: Complete every lesson to earn your credential.
course.allLessonsDone: All lessons done - claim your credential.

lesson.noContent: This lesson has no detailed content yet. Complete the knowledge check below to progress.
lesson.reviewTopic: Review this topic, then complete the knowledge check below.
lesson.checkIntro: Take a short check to confirm you have absorbed this lesson. You need {{pct}}% to pass. You can retake it any time.
lesson.retakeTip: Retake the check to improve your score - your latest attempt counts.
lesson.startCheckFail: Could not start the knowledge check.
lesson.submitCheckFail: Could not submit the knowledge check.

enroll.enrollFail: Could not enroll. Please try again.

complete.issueFail: Could not issue your credential. Please try again.

credentials.title: My Credentials
credentials.subtitle: Verifiable credentials issued by VIFM. Share the verification link or download the certificate.
credentials.empty: You have no credentials yet. Complete a course or assessment to earn one.
